ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "county_fips_code" TEXT /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "county_website" TEXT /* Official website of the county */,
  "county_government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., county, city, town) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the indicator belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the indicator was measured */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the county in that year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county in that year */,
  "population_growth" REAL /* Population growth rate of the county in that year */,
  "per_capita_income" REAL /* Per capita income of the county */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income of the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the county */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate of the county */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the county */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government agency, private company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the demographic data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic data was measured */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county in that year */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the county population in that year */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the county population */,
  "race_ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity distribution of the county population */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "educational_attainment" TEXT /* Educational attainment distribution */,
  "language_distribution" TEXT /* Language distribution in the county */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government agency, private company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the query */,
  "query_time" TEXT /* Time the query was executed */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query execution */,
  "query_result_size" INTEGER /* Size of the query result in bytes */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., success, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dashboard is public or private */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "widget_data" TEXT /* Data used to populate the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the widget is active */,
  "widget_title" TEXT /* Title of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is public or private */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report file (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
